product_overview: ConfigVault is a secure configuration and secrets management platform for teams to store, share, and manage environment variables across projects and deployment stages with encryption, RBAC, audit logging, and time-limited sharing.
core_goals: Securely store and encrypt secret configuration values (AES-256-GCM) with role-based access control.
Enable teams to manage multiple projects and environments with fine-grained member roles and audit trails.
Provide safe, time-limited secret sharing and bulk import/export of environment variables.
Detect and surface configuration drift across environments and provide deployment readiness checks.
Offer developer-friendly APIs for programmatic access and automation (including AI suggestions).

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: User registration, login/logout, session management, and password reset flows for account lifecycle and secure sessions.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with {email,password} -> Receive 201 with user/session -> POST /api/auth/login with same credentials -> Receive 200 with ok and session cookie -> GET /api/auth/me with session cookie -> Receive 200 with Profile -> POST /api/auth/logout with session cookie -> Receive 200 ok
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password -> Receive 401 error
POST /api/auth/forgot-password with {email} -> Receive 200 confirmation -> POST /api/auth/reset-password with {token,newPassword} -> Receive 200 ok
POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid or expired token -> Receive 400 invalid token/validation error

features.name: Projects API
features.description: Create and manage projects and their environments; projects are the top-level containers for members and config entries.
user_flows: POST /api/projects with session cookie and {name,optionalEnvImport} -> Receive 201 Project -> GET /api/projects/[projectId] with session cookie -> Receive 200 Project (includes environments)
POST /api/projects without session cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/projects/[projectId] with session cookie as non-member -> Receive 403 Forbidden
PATCH /api/projects/[projectId] with session cookie and {updates} -> Receive 200 Project -> DELETE /api/projects/[projectId] with session cookie -> Receive 200 ok
GET /api/projects/[projectId] for non-existent project -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Project Members API
features.description: Invite, update, and remove project members with role assignments and permission flags.
user_flows: POST /api/projects/[projectId]/members with session cookie and {email,role} -> Receive 201 Member -> PATCH /api/projects/[projectId]/members/[memberId] with session cookie and {role updates} -> Receive 200 Member -> DELETE /api/projects/[projectId]/members/[memberId] with session cookie -> Receive 200 ok
POST /api/projects/[projectId]/members with session cookie lacking owner permissions -> Receive 403 Forbidden
PATCH /api/projects/[projectId]/members/[memberId] for non-existent member -> Receive 404 Not found
DELETE /api/projects/[projectId]/members/[memberId] as owner -> Receive 200 ok

features.name: Config Entries API
features.description: Create, read, update, delete, reveal, rotate, and duplicate key-value config entries per environment, with secrets encrypted at rest.
user_flows: GET /api/environments/[envId]/entries with session cookie -> Receive 200 ConfigEntry[]

POST /api/environments/[envId]/entries with session cookie and {key,value,isSecret} -> Receive 201 ConfigEntry -> PATCH /api/entries/[entryId] with session cookie and {updates} -> Receive 200 ConfigEntry -> DELETE /api/entries/[entryId] with session cookie -> Receive 200 ok
POST /api/entries/[entryId]/reveal with session cookie (user has reveal permission) -> Receive 200 {value:string}
POST /api/entries/[entryId]/reveal with session cookie (user lacks reveal permission) -> Receive 403 Forbidden

POST /api/entries/[entryId]/rotate with session cookie -> Receive 200 ConfigEntry (rotated) -> POST /api/entries/[entryId]/duplicate with session cookie and {targetEnvIds} -> Receive 200 created entries
POST /api/environments/[envId]/entries with session cookie but invalid payload -> Receive 400 validation error
DELETE /api/entries/[entryId] for non-existent entry -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Environment Import/Export API
features.description: Bulk import entries from .env content into an environment and export environment entries as a .env file.
user_flows: POST /api/environments/[envId]/import with session cookie and {envFileContent} -> Receive 200 import result -> GET /api/environments/[envId]/entries with session cookie -> Receive 200 ConfigEntry[] (includes imported entries)
GET /api/environments/[envId]/export with session cookie -> Receive 200 text/plain .env
POST /api/environments/[envId]/import with malformed .env content -> Receive 400 validation error
GET /api/environments/[envId]/export without membership (non-member) -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Audit & Readiness API
features.description: Provide project audit logs, deployment readiness checks, and duplicate-key reports to surface drift and support compliance.
user_flows: GET /api/projects/[projectId]/audit with session cookie -> Receive 200 AuditLog[]
GET /api/projects/[projectId]/readiness with session cookie -> Receive 200 readiness result
GET /api/projects/[projectId]/duplicate-keys with session cookie -> Receive 200 duplicate key report
GET /api/projects/[projectId]/audit with session cookie but lacking access -> Receive 403 Forbidden
GET /api/projects/[projectId]/readiness for non-existent project -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Share Links API
features.description: Create time-limited, view-limited share links for secrets; resolve public tokens to reveal values and revoke links when needed.
user_flows: POST /api/entries/[entryId]/share-links with session cookie and {maxViews,expiresAt,allowView} -> Receive 201 ShareLink -> GET /api/share/[token] (no auth) -> Receive 200 {value,key,...} (secret view) -> POST /api/share-links/[shareLinkId]/revoke with session cookie -> Receive 200 ok -> GET /api/share/[token] -> Receive 404 expired or invalid
POST /api/entries/[entryId]/share-links with session cookie but user lacks share permission -> Receive 403 Forbidden
GET /api/share/[token] for expired token -> Receive 404 expired or invalid

features.name: Invitations API
features.description: Tokenized project invitations that can be viewed and accepted or declined by recipients (no account required to view invitation details).
user_flows: GET /api/invitations/[token] (public) -> Receive 200 Invitation -> POST /api/invitations/[token] with {accept:true} -> Receive 200 ok -> GET /api/projects/[projectId] with session cookie -> Receive 200 Project (new member present)
GET /api/invitations/[token] for invalid or expired token -> Receive 404 invalid or expired
POST /api/invitations/[token] with invalid payload -> Receive 400 invalid

features.name: AI Suggest Config
features.description: AI-generated configuration key suggestions to help users populate environment variables and standardize keys across projects.
user_flows: POST /api/ai/suggest-config with session cookie and {projectContext,partialKey} -> Receive 200 suggestions
POST /api/ai/suggest-config without session cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Login, register, logout, session, password reset

endpoints.description: Sign in with email and password
Create a new project with optional .env import
Get project by ID with environments
Find keys with different values across environments
Resolve share token and return secret (public, view-limited)
Get AI suggestions for config keys
